(1) इन िनयम- का संि3= नाम मु2य िवुत िनरी3क और िवुत िनरी3क- क अह5ताएं, शि,याँ और कृ8य (संशोधन) िनयम, 2016 है। (2) ये राजप? म उनके )काशन क तारीख को लागू ह-गे। 2. मु2य िवुत िनरी3क और िवुत िनरी3क- क अह5ताएं, शि,याँ और कृ8य िनयम, 2006 के िनयम 5 म उपिनयम (1) के खंड (ख) म ''कम से कम दस वष5'' शCद- के Dथान पर ''कम से कम पाँच वष5'' शCद रखे जाएंगे। [फा. सं. 23/3/2004-आर एंड आर (खंड-II)] Eयोित अरोरा, संयु, सिचव टपणीः टपणीः टपणीः टपणीः मूल िनयम भारत के राजप?, असाधारण, भाग-II खंड-3, उप-खंड (i) म सा.का.िन.सं. 481(अ), तारीख 17 अगDत, 2006 (ारा )कािशत कए गए थे। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF POWER NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th May, 2016 G.S.R. 521 (E).– In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 162 and clause (z) of sub-section (2) of section 176 of the Electricity Act, 2003, (36 of 2003), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments to the Qualifications, Powers and Functions of Chief Electrical Inspector and Electrical Inspectors Rules, 2006, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Qualifications, Powers and Functions of Chief Electrical Inspector and Electrical Inspectors (Amendment) Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Qualifications, Powers and Functions of Chief Electrical Inspector and Electrical Inspectors Rules, 2006, in rule 5, in sub rule (1), in clause (b), for the words “at least ten years”, the words “at least five years” shall be substituted. [F.No. 23/3/2004-R&R (Vol-II)] JYOTI ARORA, Jt. Secy. Note:.— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub- section (i) vide number G.S.R 481(E), dated the 17th August, 2006. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
